description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design, featuring a stark contrast between black and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a large garage door, a main entrance with a glass door, and a tiled driveway. The rear of the house opens up to a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, outdoor seating, a shaded pergola, and a barbecue area, all set on a light stone terrace. Large sliding glass doors and windows provide ample natural light to the interior, with balconies and terraces on the upper floor overlooking the backyard. The landscaping includes a small patch of greenery and decorative plants, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is characterized by clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story cubic house with black and white exterior, flat roof, large windows, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The design emphasizes open spaces, outdoor living, and minimalist aesthetics.
description_view_0: The front view shows the garage, main entrance, tiled driveway, and a section of greenery along the facade.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the backyard with a swimming pool, shaded pergola, outdoor seating, barbecue area, and large glass doors opening to the patio.
description_view_2: The side view displays a plain white wall with a single door, a window, and visible patio furniture along the terrace.
description_view_3: The opposite side view features a mostly black wall with a few windows and a glimpse of the driveway and outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door, no steps, a flat overhang, and a minimalist tiled approach with no porch or columns.
